shared_properties: The panel spans the full screen width and anchors the lower 160px gameplay UI zone.
Warm brown tones match the autumn palette while remaining darker than the main playfield.
Reserved anchors keep lane, combo, and BPM placements stable across all gameplay states.
differences: This asset establishes the dark rhythm-lane foundation visible for the entire run.
The inner lane trench creates a clear track for the moving marker and note glyphs.
Layout spacing leaves room for combo text at center and BPM text at the lower-right corner.

context.usage: Dark lower-screen panel that frames beat notes, the moving marker, combo text, and BPM readout.

shape.silhouette: Wide rectangular panel with a lighter inner lane trench and reserved anchor bands for notes and labels.

acceptance_criteria: PNG canvas is exactly 1280x160px with the lane trench centered horizontally.
The inner lane trench is visibly lighter than the outer panel body so moving notes remain readable.
Safe areas for combo text and BPM labels stay free of decorative clutter.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the core loop, timing windows, obstacle pacing, UI layout, and Bevy target constraints.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the sepia autumn atmosphere, tree silhouettes, and warm color layering.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle full-width UI panel entity anchored to the lower 160px of the screen.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_rhythm_lane_panel_1280x160.png during UI boot and anchor it to the bottom edge at a fixed 1280x160 layout size.
runtime_notes: Keep the panel pixel-perfect at the full screen width so lane coordinates stay stable across the run.
Reserve internal safe areas for the moving marker track, note row, combo popup, and BPM label.
Render the panel behind the marker and note sprites while keeping it above all world layers.
